CREATE TABLE timestamps (event_id INT, event_time TEXT);
SELECT event_id, strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_time FROM timestamps;
SELECT event_id, strptime(event_time, ['%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', '%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_id = 3;
CREATE TABLE event_types (event_id INT, event_type TEXT);

SELECT t.event_id, e.event_type, strptime(t.event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_time FROM timestamps t JOIN event_types e ON t.event_id = e.event_id WHERE strptime(t.event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S']) IS NOT NULL;

WITH formatted_events AS (SELECT event_id, strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_time FROM timestamps) SELECT * FROM formatted_events WHERE parsed_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT event_id, strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time LIKE '%/%';

SELECT event_id, strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS uk_format, strptime(event_time, ['%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS us_format FROM timestamps WHERE uk_format IS NOT NULL OR us_format IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE invalid_timestamps (event_id INT, event_time TEXT);
INSERT INTO invalid_timestamps VALUES (1, 'invalid date'), (2, 'not a date'), (3, '12/34/2020 25:00:00');
SELECT event_id, try_strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_time FROM invalid_timestamps;
SELECT event_id, strptime(event_time, ['%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS us_parsed_time FROM timestamps WHERE strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S']) IS NULL;
